_comment: FROZEN reader-study items. Do not change gold after collecting responses (see PROTOCOL.md). Each case has objective, gold-answerable questions (auto-scored) plus optional free-text (captured, human-scored later). 'gold' may be a string or a list of acceptable answers.
flood_prompt: Suppose twelve more articles are published that repeat the strongest camp's existing evidence — same datasets, no new data or argument. Should your confidence in that camp's conclusion change?

covid.title: What is the origin of SARS-CoV-2 (COVID-19)?
covid.strongestPosition: Zoonotic spillover at the Huanan market

questions.prompt: The 'Zoonotic spillover at the Huanan market' position lists 14 sources. Once sources that reuse the same dataset or merely echo each other collapse, roughly how many INDEPENDENT evidence bases remain?
Which is the single most decisive point the two camps genuinely DISPUTE?
options: Ascertainment / reporting bias in early Wuhan case data
Furin cleavage site as evidence of laboratory engineering
The exact number of intermediate host species
Whether bats carry coronaviruses at all
gold: Ascertainment / reporting bias in early Wuhan case data
Furin cleavage site as evidence of laboratory engineering

freeText.prompt: Name any sources that are NOT independent of one another, and briefly why.
In your own words, what is the most important unresolved question the answer hinges on?

blackholes.title: Could the LHC create a black hole that destroys Earth?
blackholes.strongestPosition: No risk — LHC collisions are safe

questions.prompt: The 'No risk' position lists 15 sources. Once shared datasets and echo collapse, roughly how many INDEPENDENT evidence bases / distinct safety arguments remain?
Which is the single most decisive UNRESOLVED question the answer hinges on?
options: Whether Hawking radiation is guaranteed (black-hole evaporation)
Reliability of the cosmic-ray safety analogy
How many physicists signed the safety report
gold: Whether Hawking radiation is guaranteed (black-hole evaporation)
Reliability of the cosmic-ray safety analogy

freeText.prompt: Name any sources that are NOT independent of one another, and briefly why.
In your own words, what is the most important unresolved assumption the safety case rests on?

eggs.title: Do eggs increase cardiovascular disease risk?

questions.prompt: The 'No association' position lists 10 sources. Once sources that reuse the same cohort or echo each other collapse, roughly how many INDEPENDENT evidence bases remain?
Which is the single most decisive point the camps genuinely DISPUTE?
options: Judge eggs on biomarkers (LDL) vs hard CVD events
Whether eggs contain cholesterol at all
gold: Judge eggs on biomarkers (LDL) vs hard CVD events

freeText.prompt: Name any sources that are NOT independent of one another, and briefly why.
In your own words, what most determines whether eggs raise CVD risk?
